question: What is the short description of incident INC0118019?
ground_truth: The short description is: 'VPN connectivity failure affecting remote users in the Mumbai office.'
ground_truth_context:
Short Description: VPN connectivity failure affecting remote users in the Mumbai office.
Description: Multiple users in the Mumbai office are unable to connect to the corporate VPN since 09:00 IST on 2026-03-10. Estimated 45 users affected.

question: How many users were affected by the VPN issue in incident INC0118019?
ground_truth: Approximately 45 users were affected by the VPN connectivity failure.
ground_truth_context:
Description: Multiple users in the Mumbai office are unable to connect to the corporate VPN since 09:00 IST on 2026-03-10. Estimated 45 users affected.
Impact: High — business operations disrupted for Mumbai engineering team.

question: What workaround was applied for incident INC0118019?
ground_truth: The workaround applied was to route affected users through the Pune office VPN endpoint as a temporary measure.
ground_truth_context: Work Notes (2026-03-10 11:30): Workaround applied — affected users redirected to Pune VPN endpoint. 38 of 45 users restored. Root cause under investigation: suspected firewall rule change pushed at 08:45 IST.

question: What is the annual leave entitlement per year according to the HR Leave Policy?
ground_truth: Employees are entitled to 18 days of paid annual leave per calendar year.
ground_truth_context:
4.1 Annual Leave
All confirmed employees are entitled to 18 days of paid annual leave per calendar year. Leave accrues at the rate of 1.5 days per month and may be carried forward up to a maximum of 9 days into the next calendar year.

question: What is the notice period for annual leave requests according to the HR Leave Policy?
ground_truth: Employees must submit annual leave requests at least 5 working days in advance for leaves of up to 3 days, and at least 10 working days in advance for leaves longer than 3 days.
ground_truth_context:
4.3 Leave Application Process
Leave requests must be submitted via the HR portal. For leaves up to 3 days: minimum 5 working days notice. For leaves exceeding 3 days: minimum 10 working days notice. Emergency leave may be approved by the reporting manager with same-day notice.

question: What are the official working hours defined in the company policy?
ground_truth: Official working hours are 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM, Monday to Friday, with a 1-hour lunch break. The total working hours per day are 8 hours.
ground_truth_context:
3.1 Standard Working Hours
Official working hours: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM, Monday to Friday.
Lunch break: 1 hour (1:00 PM – 2:00 PM).
Total billable hours per day: 8 hours.
Flexible start time is available between 8:00 AM and 10:00 AM subject to manager approval.

question: What is the base URL for the RAG API in the staging environment?
ground_truth: The base URL for the RAG API in the staging environment is https://api-staging.internal.company.com/rag/v1.
ground_truth_context:
API Endpoints
Environment   Base URL
Development   http://localhost:8080/api/rag
Staging       https://api-staging.internal.company.com/rag/v1
Production    https://api.internal.company.com/rag/v1

All endpoints require Bearer token authentication.

question: What HTTP method and path are used to ingest a document into the RAG system?
ground_truth: Document ingestion uses a POST request to /ingest with the file sent as multipart/form-data under the field name 'file'.
ground_truth_context:
POST /ingest
Description : Upload and index a document.
Content-Type: multipart/form-data
Field       : file (required) — supported formats: PDF, DOCX, HTML
Response    : 200 OK on success
Error       : 413 if file exceeds upload size limit

question: What is the probation period for new employees as stated in the onboarding policy?
ground_truth: The probation period for new employees is 6 months from the date of joining.
ground_truth_context:
2.1 Probation Period
All new employees are subject to a probation period of 6 months from their date of joining. During this period, performance will be evaluated by the reporting manager. Confirmation of employment is subject to satisfactory performance review at the end of the probation period.

question: What is the company's policy on work-from-home days per week?
ground_truth: Employees are permitted up to 2 work-from-home days per week, subject to manager approval and role eligibility.
ground_truth_context:
5.2 Hybrid Work Policy
Eligible employees may work from home up to 2 days per week. Eligibility is determined by role type and tenure (minimum 6 months confirmed employment). Work-from-home days must be approved by the reporting manager and cannot include Monday or Friday without special approval.

question: What was the root cause identified for the VPN failure in incident INC0118019?
ground_truth: The suspected root cause was a firewall rule change pushed at 08:45 IST on 2026-03-10 that inadvertently blocked VPN traffic.
ground_truth_context:
Work Notes (2026-03-10 11:30): Workaround applied — affected users redirected to Pune VPN endpoint. 38 of 45 users restored. Root cause under investigation: suspected firewall rule change pushed at 08:45 IST.
Work Notes (2026-03-13 09:00): Root cause confirmed — firewall policy update CHG0045231 blocked UDP port 1194.
